decisions.decision: Test AccountPnlSection with limited scope: test the no-accountId state (default jsdom localStorage) and one data-populated state (set localStorage before render). Skip exhaustive AccountPnl states.
alternatives_rejected: Skip AccountPnlSection entirely — misses important route behavior
Test all AccountPnlSection states (loading, error, data, empty) — too much scope for this task

decisions.decision: Test URL search param synchronization: verify initial params populate correct selections, and that changing market/interval updates URL params. Use MemoryRouter initialEntries.
alternatives_rejected: Skip URL param tests — misses core user-facing behavior (shareable/bookmarkable URLs)

decisions.decision: Use mock data with 2-3 points per price series and 2-3 volume buckets. Assert chart presence via data-testid ('price-chart', 'volume-chart') without inspecting individual SVG paths.
alternatives_rejected: Use minimal empty mock data — charts conditionally render paths based on data length, so this would miss meaningful SVG rendering
Use large realistic datasets — unnecessary for presence/rendering assertions

decisions.decision: Interact with market dropdown using getByTestId('market-select') and fireEvent.change, matching existing test patterns. The element is a native <select> with data-testid='market-select'.
alternatives_rejected: Use getByRole('combobox') — works but testid is more explicit and matches the code's intent

decisions.decision: Test interval toggle by verifying visual state changes (active button styling) after clicking Day/Hour buttons. Query buttons by role('button') and name.
alternatives_rejected: Assert on getMarketAnalytics mock call args — couples test to implementation details and query key structure

decisions.decision: Mock the API client module (vi.mock('@/lib/api/client')) and mock individual functions (listMarkets, getMarketAnalytics, getAccountPnl), following the MarketList.test.tsx pattern.
alternatives_rejected: Mock React Query hooks directly — diverges from existing test patterns and is more fragile

decisions.decision: Follow describe/it/beforeEach structure from MarketList.test.tsx: one describe block, beforeEach for common mocks, individual it blocks for each state/interaction.
alternatives_rejected: Nested describe blocks per section — adds indentation without benefit for a single-component test file

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/Analytics.test.tsx with imports, vi.mock('@/lib/api/client'), mock data constants (markets array, MarketAnalyticsResponse with 3 price points per series and 3 volume buckets), and beforeEach that sets up default mock return values for listMarkets and getMarketAnalytics.
Add test: 'shows loading state' — mock listMarkets to return a pending promise, assert loading indicator is rendered.
Add test: 'shows error state' — mock listMarkets to reject, assert error message is rendered.
Add test: 'shows empty state when no markets exist' — mock listMarkets to return empty array, assert 'No markets exist yet' message and link to /markets/new.

Add test: 'renders charts and analytics data when data loads' — mock successful listMarkets and getMarketAnalytics, wait for data, assert presence of price-chart and volume-chart testids, and verify market title is displayed in filters.
Add test: 'changes market selection via dropdown' — render with data, use fireEvent.change on market-select dropdown, verify the new market is selected.
Add test: 'toggles interval between Day and Hour' — render with data, click Hour button, verify it becomes active; click Day button, verify it becomes active.
Add test: 'initializes from URL search params' — render with initialEntries=['/analytics?market=<id>&interval=hour'], verify correct market is selected and Hour interval is active.
Add test: 'shows AccountPnlSection prompt when no accountId is set' — render with default (empty) localStorage, assert 'Set your Account ID' message is present.
Run vitest on the new test file to verify all tests pass. Fix any failures.
